en_title: heart like a newly embroidered kerchief
en_body:
square of cloth
threads curving in colors embroidered
the letters of your name
embrace the waist of mine
clouds veil the bright sky
square kerchief
which kerchief slipped into a pocket
waiting to wipe rose-colored tears
river-bend
winding
encircling arms
bridge inclines its shoulder
calling longing
mist dimming
why hurry your quick steps
pressing toward shore
pause here a little
so love may
remember deeply

kerchief embroidered complete
softly
given into your hand
mid-bridge remembering the rhythm
keep the kerchief
admonish the heart

kerchief like the heart
choosing each colored thread
offering love till it aches again
like the needle embroidering love


.........................................
* Trịnh Công Sơn
note: The kerchief and bridge echo the intimate song-world of Vietnamese composer Trịnh Công Sơn, named in the dedication.
